opportunity.title: Show HN: Soros – AI for geopolitical macro investing
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Routing LLMs for macro analysis is fascinating—the "grounding" problem becomes critical; hallucinations in this domain have real-world consequences. Consider a multi-agent architecture where specialized models focus on data ingestion and fact-checking *before* feeding into a higher-level reasoning agent; it’s an extra layer of complexity but significantly improves reliability. The cost of inference also explodes quickly with this approach, so efficient quantization and model distillation are crucial.
actions.reasoning: My experience building AI agents for complex decision-making systems gives me a perspective on the technical challenges presented in routing LLMs for geopolitical analysis.
